backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a dairy business backend with customer, delivery record, and milk production record management, protected by role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (monthly report hooks, MonthlyReports page, delivery/milk report sections) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design token variables for light and dark themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with seven routes (/, /cattle, /milk, /inventory, /customers, /deliveries, /reports) all wrapped in the shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/CattleForm.tsx: Reusable controlled form for adding or editing cattle records (name, breed, birth date, status), importing the Cattle type from the local types file.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: A reusable form component for adding or editing a customer, with fields for name, address, phone, and active status toggle.
frontend/src/components/InventoryForm.ts: A dual-mode form component for either adding a new inventory item (name, category, quantity, unit) or updating the quantity of an existing item.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky top navigation bar with links to all main sections, supporting both desktop and mobile (hamburger) layouts.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionCh: A bar chart component that aggregates milk production records over the last 7 days and renders them using Recharts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating farm data (cattle, milk records, inventory, customers, deliveries, milk production) along with time utility helpers. Cattle, milk record, and inventory hooks are stubbed out and disabled since those backend endpoints no longer exist.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm earthy CSS custom-property theme (light and dark modes) including farm-specific color tokens and print styles.
frontend/src/lib/localTypes.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces (Cattle, MilkRecord, InventoryItem) that mirror removed backend types so existing pages continue to compile without backend support.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CattleManagement.tsx: Page component for viewing and managing cattle records, displaying a stats summary and a table with add/edit dialogs and status toggle; backed by stubbed hooks that no longer call the backend.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerManagement.ts: Page component for managing milk delivery customers, showing active/inactive stats, a full customer table, and add/edit dialogs backed by live backend query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that aggregates today's milk yield, cattle count, low-stock inventory, and delivery status into summary cards, a milk production chart, and a recent milk records table.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryReports.tsx: Page component for logging and viewing daily milk delivery records, with a form to submit deliveries and a filterable table showing delivered/missed counts by date.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryManagement.t: Page component for managing farm inventory items (feed, medicine, supplies), supporting add and quantity-update operations with low-stock highlighting.
frontend/src/pages/MilkProduction.tsx: Page component for logging and tracking daily milk yield per cattle, with date-range filtering, totals, and a production chart.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReports.tsx: Page component that aggregates and displays monthly delivery and milk production statistics for a selected month/year, with summary stat cards and printable tables.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Nunito, Merriweather), and an extended color palette using oklch CSS variables including farm-themed, sidebar, chart, warning, and success colors.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 13) for AO Farms dairy management app, listing existing features (dashboard, cattle, milk production, inventory, customers, deliveries, reports) along with architectural notes, known issues, and feature metadata.
